project.name: Bát Tự AI
project.status: Accuracy Audit Completed & Entering Phase 05 (Room UI Sync)

tables.name: history
tables.description: Stores user Bát Tự charts and AI results

features: Bát Tự core calculation (Four Pillars, Ten Gods, Elements)
Accurate Nạp Âm (60 Giáp Tý) mapping
Tàng Can weights (60-30-10) and correct branch interpretation
Life Stages (12 Trường Sinh) with Yin-Yang direction rules
Day Master Strength follows 12 Vòng Trường Sinh (Tuyệt, Tử, Mộ...)
Distinction between Year-based and Day-based Shen Sha
Extended Shen Sha: Văn Xương, Kiếp Sát, Thập Ác Đại Bại, Đào Hoa, Thiên Y, Hồng Loan, Thiên Hỉ
Weighted Element Balance with Season Multipliers and Xun Kong deductions
Branch Interactions (Luc Hop, Luc Xung, Tam Hop, Tam Hinh, Ban Tam Hop, Cung Hop, Phuc Ngam)
Luck Pillar (Dai Van) calculation with term-based offset (3 days = 1 year)
Tuần Không (Void Branches) calculation (Niên Không, Nhật Không)
Ten Gods for all Hidden Stems (Main, Middle, Residual)
Thai Nguyên (Fetal Origin) and Mệnh Cung (Life Palace) calculation
Settings management for API Keys and Models
Annual Luck (Lưu Niên) pillars for current luck period

gotchas: Metadata version mismatch in Kotlin 2.1.0+ requires Room 2.7+
Day master strength must follow 12 Stages for higher accuracy
Year vs Day based Quý Nhân should be clarified
Calendar seconds/milliseconds must be reset for precise term calculations
Hidden Stems of Tỵ (巳): Canh Kim is Trung Khí (30%), Mậu Thổ is Dư Khí (10%) due to Tỵ being Trường Sinh of Kim
